rules.name: import-shadcn-ui-variants
rules.evidence: import from 'ui', use `_Shadcn_` suffixed variants for form primitives

rules.name: no-hardcoded-colors
rules.evidence: Tailwind only, semantic tokens (`bg-muted`, `text-foreground-light`), no hardcoded colors.

rules.name: prefer-shortcut-registry-over-listeners
rules.evidence: Prefer registered, discoverable shortcuts over one-off keyboard listeners

uncompilable: Use U.S. English everywhere — general language/tone guidance not tied to a specific tool call.
Co-locate sub-components with parent — general code-organization guidance too vague to bind to a specific action via regex.
